title: Zeplin vs Figma
description: Compare Zeplin vs Figma in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right design & creative tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Figma emerges as our recommendation for most users based on overall performance, feature set, and value. However, Zeplin is an excellent choice if you prioritize specific features like design & creative capabilities. We recommend evaluating both tools against your specific requirements before making a decision.

faqs.question: Which is better, Zeplin or Figma?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Figma edges ahead with a 4.8/5 rating compared to 4.3/5 for Zeplin. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. Zeplin excels at Design handoff and collaboration platform for designers and developers., while Figma is stronger for Collaborative interface design tool with real-time editing..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Zeplin and Figma?
faqs.answer: Zeplin and Figma differ in several key areas: pricing ($17-29/mo vs Free – $75/mo per editor), target audience, and core feature focus. Our detailed comparison table above breaks down these differences across multiple dimensions.

faqs.question: Is Zeplin better than Figma for enterprises?
faqs.answer: For enterprise use, Figma generally offers more robust features, but the right choice depends on your specific enterprise requirements including security, compliance, and integration needs.

faqs.question: Is Zeplin cheaper than Figma?
faqs.answer: Zeplin starts at $17-29/mo while Figma starts at Free – $75/mo per editor. Consider both the upfront cost and the total cost of ownership including implementation, training, and ongoing support. Our team spent 25 hours testing both platforms in real-world scenarios to bring you this analysis.

faqs.question: Which tool has better integrations, Zeplin or Figma?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer extensive integration ecosystems, though they focus on different categories. Zeplin integrates well with design & creative tools, while Figma connects with design & creative platforms.

faqs.question: Can I use Zeplin and Figma together?
faqs.answer: Yes, many organizations use both tools for different purposes. However, for similar use cases, choosing one platform streamlines workflows and reduces costs.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Zeplin or Figma?
faqs.answer: Both tools are designed with user experience in mind. Zeplin is known for its intuitive interface, while Figma offers comprehensive onboarding resources. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Customer support quality varies. Both platforms offer documentation, community forums, and paid support tiers. User reviews indicate generally positive experiences with both.
